TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Mong-na-li-sa, title = Mong-na-li-sa, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mong-na-li-sa} }

S.FORM: Mong-na-li-sa :La Gioconda,Áôľťü≥:(d ío'konda)śąĖMonna Lisa,Áôľťü≥:('m…Ēnna 'liňźza)Ôľõś≥ēŤ™ě:La Joconde,Áôľťü≥:( í…Ēk…ĒŐÉd)) . "Mong-na-li-sa" "I-tali a kamu, La Gioconda a pangiha, "d ío'konda" anucaay Monna Lisa, pangiha "'m…Ēnna 'liňźza" Ba a kamu La Joconde pangiha " í…Ēk…ĒŐÉd" han, u kacumelakan nu mikulitay ci Li-aw-na-to.Ta-wen-si a nikulitan tu cacay nu tademaway a nikulitan atu tungusay a nikulitan. ". nasa nu I-ta-li nalimaan misulitay tu kacumelakan sakapahay a nikulitan, mapatinaku tu aca "i kitakit u singanganay, u sadayahay a nizizawan, u hina masulitay, madadiway, mitudungay tu nisanga'an tu kucungay". uyni kulitay mitudung tu cacay nalabuay a wayway, nguhitay a tawa a tatayna, u tawa niza uzuma pangangan han tu "kaliyuhan a tawa". (Francesco del Giocondo) . uynia nikulitan nitudungan tu nu mu-tu-al saca sakay nu Bow-low-lun-s u kakitaan nu misuwbayay ci Bow-lang-cye-s-ke.te-al.cyaw-kung-to "Francesco del Giocondo" a acawaw ci Li-sa,cyaw-kung-to. mapakulit i salengacay a Lin-pa-ti-pay-yang- sapadan. Ta-wen-si uyni anikulitan caay henay pabeli ci Cyaw-kung-toan a lamuma'an. zikuz palatateng' cinizaan i tudawaan uyni a nikulitan sapabeli tu minalayay niza ci Ta-aw lye-nuo. . ciniza u i 1503 a mihcaan katukuh 1506 a mihcaan nisanga'an a bacu, namahiza ci Ta-wan-si hakay katukuh i 1517 a mihcaan kya malepun tuyni a nisanga'an. sazikuzay, "Mung-na-li-sa" macakay nu cacay a lasubu a mihcaan nu Ba-kow a kowang ci Bow-lang-su-wa, ayza u zaysang tu nu Ba-kow. makay 1797 a mihcaanay i Pa-li Bow-low-bu-kung tenes satu patahakal paazih. (Francesco del Giocondo)ÁöĄŚ§ęšļļťļóŤéé¬∑ŚĖ¨ŚģģŚ§ö. "Mong-na-li-sa" u siacaay a nikulitan i kitakit. i 1962 a mihcaan i likisian u satalakaway a ni pipawsyen i kitakit u satalakaway a niciluan, u aca 1 ik' ku kalisiw "i 2021 a mihcaan tu 8.7 I'k a kalisiw". uyni nikulitan nitudungan tu nu muo-tuo mapasaka nu Bow-low-lun-s kakitaan Bow- lang-cye-s-ke.te-al.cyaw-kung-to "Francesco del Giocondo" a acawa ci Li-sa.cyaw-kung-to. mapakulit tu salengacay a Lun-pa-ti-pay-yanga sapadan. Ta-wen-si caay henay pabeli ci Cyaw-kung- to a laluma'an tuyni a nikulitan, zikuz patatenga' cinizaan i pitudawaan nuyni a nikulitan pabeli tu minalayay nizza ci Ta-aw-lye-nuo. saciniza u i 1503 a mihcaan katukuh 1506 a mihcaan a nisangna'an a nikulitan, saca ci Ta-wen-si hakay katukuh i 1517 a mihcaan kya malepun kuyni nisangaan. likisiś≠∑ŚŹ≤ 5 a mihcaan katukuh 16 a zidayan, u madimelay a tatayna nisanga'an tu nikulitan tu nu tademaw i kucungay u hina maazihay tu, Ta-wen-si u nisanga'an tu nikulitan uyni a nikulitan tu aazihan a ngangan "Mung-na-li-sa" han, namahiza bacuay a tatayna a uzip u sasakamuen nu binawlan, ci Bow-lang-cye-s-ke a laluma'an u zuma a tademaw katinengan nu mikulitay atu misanga'ay patizengay a sayhu ci Cyaw-al.wa-sa-li i 1550 a mihcaan a nisiulitan, "Li-aw-na-to saka ci Bow-lang-cye-s-ke.Te-al.cyaw-kungn-to a acawa ci Mong-na-li-sa mkulit tu cacay masatademaway". ci Li-sa.cyaw-kung-to nu I-tali Bow-low-lun-s atuTo-s-ka-na a Ke-la-ti-ni a laluma'an a sakaput, u iluc sakay ci Li-saan caay ka yadah ku nikatineng tu nikauzipan. i Bow-low-lun-s a lecuhan ciniza. cacay a bataan ku mihcaan niza mikadabu tu dawaay atu malaymayan a dawa nu misiwbanay a tademaw, siacawa tu hawsa mala tapang henay nu itizaay, lalima ku nilecuh tu wawa, mapatay tu ku acawa niza, mala siw-ni tu ci Li-sa, i 1442 a mihcaan 7 a bulad 15 a demiad mapatay, 64 ku mihcaan a pahezek ku mihcaan .
S.PHON: moŇč-na-r~…ĺi-sa :r~…ĺa gio ¶onda,**:(d*o Ē~ °konda)*monna r~…ĺisa,**:( Ē~ °m*nna Ē~ °r~…ĺi*za)***:r~…ĺa *o ¶ond…ô,**:(**k**d)) . "moŇč-na-r~…ĺi-sa" "i-tar~…ĺi a kamu, r~…ĺa gio ¶onda a paŇčińßa, "d*o Ē~ °konda" anu ¶aaj monna r~…ĺisa, paŇčińßa " Ē~ °m*nna Ē~ °r~…ĺi*za" ba a kamu r~…ĺa *o ¶ond…ô paŇčińßa "**k**d" ńßan, u ka ¶um…ôr~…ĺakan nu mikur~…ĺitaj ¶i r~…ĺi-aw-na-to.ta-w…ôn-si a nikur~…ĺitan tu ¶a ¶aj nu tad…ômawaj a nikur~…ĺitan atu tuŇčusaj a nikur~…ĺitan. ". nasa nu i-ta-r~…ĺi nar~…ĺimaan misur~…ĺitaj tu ka ¶um…ôr~…ĺakan sakapańßaj a nikur~…ĺitan, mapatinaku tu a ¶a "i kitakit u siŇčaŇčanaj, u sadajańßaj a nizizawan, u ńßina masur~…ĺitaj, madadiwaj, mituduŇčaj tu nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu ku ¶uŇčaj". ujni kur~…ĺitaj mituduŇč tu ¶a ¶aj nar~…ĺabuaj a wajwaj, Ňčuńßitaj a tawa a tatajna, u tawa niza uzuma paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu "kar~…ĺijuńßan a tawa". (fran ¶…ôs ¶o d…ôr~…ĺ gio ¶ondo) . ujnia nikur~…ĺitan nituduŇčan tu nu mu-tu-ar~…ĺ sa ¶a sakaj nu bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-s u kakitaan nu misuwbajaj ¶i bow-r~…ĺaŇč- ¶j…ô-s-k…ô.t…ô-ar~…ĺ. ¶jaw-kuŇč-to "fran ¶…ôs ¶o d…ôr~…ĺ gio ¶ondo" a a ¶awaw ¶i r~…ĺi-sa, ¶jaw-kuŇč-to. mapakur~…ĺit i sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a r~…ĺin-pa-ti-paj-jaŇč- sapadan. ta-w…ôn-si ujni anikur~…ĺitan ¶aaj ńß…ônaj pab…ôr~…ĺi ¶i ¶jaw-kuŇč-toan a r~…ĺamuma Ē~ °an. zikuz par~…ĺatat…ôŇč Ē~ ° ¶inizaan i tudawaan ujni a nikur~…ĺitan sapab…ôr~…ĺi tu minar~…ĺajaj niza ¶i ta-aw r~…ĺj…ô-nuo. . ¶iniza u i **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan nisaŇča Ē~ °an a ba ¶u, namańßiza ¶i ta-wan-si ńßakaj katukuńß i **** a mińß ¶aan kja mar~…ĺ…ôpun tujni a nisaŇča Ē~ °an. sazikuzaj, "muŇč-na-r~…ĺi-sa" ma ¶akaj nu ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan nu ba-kow a kowaŇč ¶i bow-r~…ĺaŇč-su-wa, ajza u zajsaŇč tu nu ba-kow. makaj **** a mińß ¶aanaj i pa-r~…ĺi bow-r~…ĺow-bu-kuŇč t…ôn…ôs satu patańßakar~…ĺ paazińß. (fran ¶…ôs ¶o d…ôr~…ĺ gio ¶ondo)*********. "moŇč-na-r~…ĺi-sa" u sia ¶aaj a nikur~…ĺitan i kitakit. i **** a mińß ¶aan i r~…ĺikisian u satar~…ĺakawaj a ni pipawsj…ôn i kitakit u satar~…ĺakawaj a ni ¶ir~…ĺuan, u a ¶a * ik Ē~ ° ku kar~…ĺisiw "i **** a mińß ¶aan tu *.* i Ē~ °k a kar~…ĺisiw". ujni nikur~…ĺitan nituduŇčan tu nu muo-tuo mapasaka nu bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-s kakitaan bow- r~…ĺaŇč- ¶j…ô-s-k…ô.t…ô-ar~…ĺ. ¶jaw-kuŇč-to "fran ¶…ôs ¶o d…ôr~…ĺ gio ¶ondo" a a ¶awa ¶i r~…ĺi-sa. ¶jaw-kuŇč-to. mapakur~…ĺit tu sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a r~…ĺun-pa-ti-paj-jaŇča sapadan. ta-w…ôn-si ¶aaj ńß…ônaj pab…ôr~…ĺi ¶i ¶jaw-kuŇč- to a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an tujni a nikur~…ĺitan, zikuz patat…ôŇča Ē~ ° ¶inizaan i pitudawaan nujni a nikur~…ĺitan pab…ôr~…ĺi tu minar~…ĺajaj nizza ¶i ta-aw-r~…ĺj…ô-nuo. sa ¶iniza u i **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan a nisaŇčna Ē~ °an a nikur~…ĺitan, sa ¶a ¶i ta-w…ôn-si ńßakaj katukuńß i **** a mińß ¶aan kja mar~…ĺ…ôpun kujni nisaŇčaan. r~…ĺikisi** * a mińß ¶aan katukuńß ** a zidajan, u madim…ôr~…ĺaj a tatajna nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu nikur~…ĺitan tu nu tad…ômaw i ku ¶uŇčaj u ńßina maazińßaj tu, ta-w…ôn-si u nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu nikur~…ĺitan ujni a nikur~…ĺitan tu aazińßan a ŇčaŇčan "muŇč-na-r~…ĺi-sa" ńßan, namańßiza ba ¶uaj a tatajna a uzip u sasakamu…ôn nu binawr~…ĺan, ¶i bow-r~…ĺaŇč- ¶j…ô-s-k…ô a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an u zuma a tad…ômaw katin…ôŇčan nu mikur~…ĺitaj atu misaŇča Ē~ °aj patiz…ôŇčaj a sajńßu ¶i ¶jaw-ar~…ĺ.wa-sa-r~…ĺi i **** a mińß ¶aan a nisiur~…ĺitan, "r~…ĺi-aw-na-to saka ¶i bow-r~…ĺaŇč- ¶j…ô-s-k…ô.t…ô-ar~…ĺ. ¶jaw-kuŇčn-to a a ¶awa ¶i moŇč-na-r~…ĺi-sa mkur~…ĺit tu ¶a ¶aj masatad…ômawaj". ¶i r~…ĺi-sa. ¶jaw-kuŇč-to nu i-tar~…ĺi bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-s atuto-s-ka-na a k…ô-r~…ĺa-ti-ni a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an a sakaput, u ir~…ĺu ¶ sakaj ¶i r~…ĺi-saan ¶aaj ka jadańß ku nikatin…ôŇč tu nikauzipan. i bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-s a r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ¶iniza. ¶a ¶aj a bataan ku mińß ¶aan niza mikadabu tu dawaaj atu mar~…ĺajmajan a dawa nu misiwbanaj a tad…ômaw, sia ¶awa tu ńßawsa mar~…ĺa tapaŇč ńß…ônaj nu itizaaj, r~…ĺar~…ĺima ku nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß tu wawa, mapataj tu ku a ¶awa niza, mar~…ĺa siw-ni tu ¶i r~…ĺi-sa, i **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad mapataj, ** ku mińß ¶aan a pańß…ôz…ôk ku mińß ¶aan .
S.FORM: Mong-na-li-sa :La Gioconda,Áôľťü≥:(d ío'konda)śąĖMonna Lisa,Áôľťü≥:('m…Ēnna 'liňźza)Ôľõś≥ēŤ™ě:La Joconde,Áôľťü≥:( í…Ēk…ĒŐÉd)) . "Mong-na-li-sa" "I-tali a kamu, La Gioconda a pangiha, "d ío'konda" anucaay Monna Lisa, pangiha "'m…Ēnna 'liňźza" Ba a kamu La Joconde pangiha " í…Ēk…ĒŐÉd" han, u kacumelakan nu mikulitay ci Li-aw-na-to.Ta-wen-si a nikulitan tu cacay nu tademaway a nikulitan atu tungusay a nikulitan. ". nasa nu I-ta-li nalimaan misulitay tu kacumelakan sakapahay a nikulitan, mapatinaku tu aca "i kitakit u singanganay, u sadayahay a nizizawan, u hina masulitay, madadiway, mitudungay tu nisanga'an tu kucungay". uyni kulitay mitudung tu cacay nalabuay a wayway, nguhitay a tawa a tatayna, u tawa niza uzuma pangangan han tu "kaliyuhan a tawa". (Francesco del Giocondo) . uynia nikulitan nitudungan tu nu mu-tu-al saca sakay nu Bow-low-lun-s u kakitaan nu misuwbayay ci Bow-lang-cye-s-ke.te-al.cyaw-kung-to "Francesco del Giocondo" a acawaw ci Li-sa,cyaw-kung-to. mapakulit i salengacay a Lin-pa-ti-pay-yang- sapadan. Ta-wen-si uyni anikulitan caay henay pabeli ci Cyaw-kung-toan a lamuma'an. zikuz palatateng' cinizaan i tudawaan uyni a nikulitan sapabeli tu minalayay niza ci Ta-aw lye-nuo. . ciniza u i 1503 a mihcaan katukuh 1506 a mihcaan nisanga'an a bacu, namahiza ci Ta-wan-si hakay katukuh i 1517 a mihcaan kya malepun tuyni a nisanga'an. sazikuzay, "Mung-na-li-sa" macakay nu cacay a lasubu a mihcaan nu Ba-kow a kowang ci Bow-lang-su-wa, ayza u zaysang tu nu Ba-kow. makay 1797 a mihcaanay i Pa-li Bow-low-bu-kung tenes satu patahakal paazih. (Francesco del Giocondo)ÁöĄŚ§ęšļļťļóŤéé¬∑ŚĖ¨ŚģģŚ§ö. "Mong-na-li-sa" u siacaay a nikulitan i kitakit. i 1962 a mihcaan i likisian u satalakaway a ni pipawsyen i kitakit u satalakaway a niciluan, u aca 1 ik' ku kalisiw "i 2021 a mihcaan tu 8.7 I'k a kalisiw". uyni nikulitan nitudungan tu nu muo-tuo mapasaka nu Bow-low-lun-s kakitaan Bow- lang-cye-s-ke.te-al.cyaw-kung-to "Francesco del Giocondo" a acawa ci Li-sa.cyaw-kung-to. mapakulit tu salengacay a Lun-pa-ti-pay-yanga sapadan. Ta-wen-si caay henay pabeli ci Cyaw-kung- to a laluma'an tuyni a nikulitan, zikuz patatenga' cinizaan i pitudawaan nuyni a nikulitan pabeli tu minalayay nizza ci Ta-aw-lye-nuo. saciniza u i 1503 a mihcaan katukuh 1506 a mihcaan a nisangna'an a nikulitan, saca ci Ta-wen-si hakay katukuh i 1517 a mihcaan kya malepun kuyni nisangaan. likisiś≠∑ŚŹ≤ 5 a mihcaan katukuh 16 a zidayan, u madimelay a tatayna nisanga'an tu nikulitan tu nu tademaw i kucungay u hina maazihay tu, Ta-wen-si u nisanga'an tu nikulitan uyni a nikulitan tu aazihan a ngangan "Mung-na-li-sa" han, namahiza bacuay a tatayna a uzip u sasakamuen nu binawlan, ci Bow-lang-cye-s-ke a laluma'an u zuma a tademaw katinengan nu mikulitay atu misanga'ay patizengay a sayhu ci Cyaw-al.wa-sa-li i 1550 a mihcaan a nisiulitan, "Li-aw-na-to saka ci Bow-lang-cye-s-ke.Te-al.cyaw-kungn-to a acawa ci Mong-na-li-sa mkulit tu cacay masatademaway". ci Li-sa.cyaw-kung-to nu I-tali Bow-low-lun-s atuTo-s-ka-na a Ke-la-ti-ni a laluma'an a sakaput, u iluc sakay ci Li-saan caay ka yadah ku nikatineng tu nikauzipan. i Bow-low-lun-s a lecuhan ciniza. cacay a bataan ku mihcaan niza mikadabu tu dawaay atu malaymayan a dawa nu misiwbanay a tademaw, siacawa tu hawsa mala tapang henay nu itizaay, lalima ku nilecuh tu wawa, mapatay tu ku acawa niza, mala siw-ni tu ci Li-sa, i 1442 a mihcaan 7 a bulad 15 a demiad mapatay, 64 ku mihcaan a pahezek ku mihcaan .
S.PHON: moŇč-na-r~…ĺi-sa :r~…ĺa gio ¶onda,**:(d*o Ē~ °konda)*monna r~…ĺisa,**:( Ē~ °m*nna Ē~ °r~…ĺi*za)***:r~…ĺa *o ¶ond…ô,**:(**k**d)) . "moŇč-na-r~…ĺi-sa" "i-tar~…ĺi a kamu, r~…ĺa gio ¶onda a paŇčińßa, "d*o Ē~ °konda" anu ¶aaj monna r~…ĺisa, paŇčińßa " Ē~ °m*nna Ē~ °r~…ĺi*za" ba a kamu r~…ĺa *o ¶ond…ô paŇčińßa "**k**d" ńßan, u ka ¶um…ôr~…ĺakan nu mikur~…ĺitaj ¶i r~…ĺi-aw-na-to.ta-w…ôn-si a nikur~…ĺitan tu ¶a ¶aj nu tad…ômawaj a nikur~…ĺitan atu tuŇčusaj a nikur~…ĺitan. ". nasa nu i-ta-r~…ĺi nar~…ĺimaan misur~…ĺitaj tu ka ¶um…ôr~…ĺakan sakapańßaj a nikur~…ĺitan, mapatinaku tu a ¶a "i kitakit u siŇčaŇčanaj, u sadajańßaj a nizizawan, u ńßina masur~…ĺitaj, madadiwaj, mituduŇčaj tu nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu ku ¶uŇčaj". ujni kur~…ĺitaj mituduŇč tu ¶a ¶aj nar~…ĺabuaj a wajwaj, Ňčuńßitaj a tawa a tatajna, u tawa niza uzuma paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu "kar~…ĺijuńßan a tawa". d…ôr~…ĺ gio ¶ondo" a a ¶awa ¶i r~…ĺi-sa. ¶jaw-kuŇč-to. mapakur~…ĺit tu sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a r~…ĺun-pa-ti-paj-jaŇča sapadan. ta-w…ôn-si ¶aaj ńß…ônaj pab…ôr~…ĺi ¶i ¶jaw-kuŇč- to a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an tujni a nikur~…ĺitan, zikuz patat…ôŇča Ē~ ° ¶inizaan i pitudawaan nujni a nikur~…ĺitan pab…ôr~…ĺi tu minar~…ĺajaj nizza ¶i ta-aw-r~…ĺj…ô-nuo. sa ¶iniza u i **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan a nisaŇčna Ē~ °an a nikur~…ĺitan, sa ¶a ¶i ta-w…ôn-si ńßakaj katukuńß i **** a mińß ¶aan kja mar~…ĺ…ôpun kujni nisaŇčaan. r~…ĺikisi** * a mińß ¶aan katukuńß ** a zidajan, u madim…ôr~…ĺaj a tatajna nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu nikur~…ĺitan tu nu tad…ômaw i ku ¶uŇčaj u ńßina maazińßaj tu, ta-w…ôn-si u nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu nikur~…ĺitan ujni a nikur~…ĺitan tu aazińßan a ŇčaŇčan "muŇč-na-r~…ĺi-sa" ńßan, namańßiza ba ¶uaj a tatajna a uzip u sasakamu…ôn nu binawr~…ĺan, ¶i bow-r~…ĺaŇč- ¶j…ô-s-k…ô a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an u zuma a tad…ômaw katin…ôŇčan nu mikur~…ĺitaj atu misaŇča Ē~ °aj patiz…ôŇčaj a sajńßu ¶i ¶jaw-ar~…ĺ.wa-sa-r~…ĺi i **** a mińß ¶aan a nisiur~…ĺitan, "r~…ĺi-aw-na-to saka ¶i bow-r~…ĺaŇč- ¶j…ô-s-k…ô.t…ô-ar~…ĺ. ¶jaw-kuŇčn-to a a ¶awa ¶i moŇč-na-r~…ĺi-sa mkur~…ĺit tu ¶a ¶aj masatad…ômawaj". ¶i r~…ĺi-sa. ¶jaw-kuŇč-to nu i-tar~…ĺi bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-s atuto-s-ka-na a k…ô-r~…ĺa-ti-ni a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an a sakaput, u ir~…ĺu ¶ sakaj ¶i r~…ĺi-saan ¶aaj ka jadańß ku nikatin…ôŇč tu nikauzipan. i bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-s a r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ¶iniza. ¶a ¶aj a bataan ku mińß ¶aan niza mikadabu tu dawaaj atu mar~…ĺajmajan a dawa nu misiwbanaj a tad…ômaw, sia ¶awa tu ńßawsa mar~…ĺa tapaŇč ńß…ônaj nu itizaaj, r~…ĺar~…ĺima ku nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß tu wawa, mapataj tu ku a ¶awa niza, mar~…ĺa siw-ni tu ¶i r~…ĺi-sa, i **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad mapataj, ** ku mińß ¶aan a pańß…ôz…ôk ku mińß ¶aan .
